snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review retains the published Reader transform and toolbar repairs and binds the Home optimistic-send and streamed-turn convergence correction on sole main 885872e9. Send clears and projects one temporary user turn immediately, durable event and Job identities deduplicate it, authoritative completion wins over stale running summaries, and non-durable failure restores only the unchanged draft without altering Agent, attachment, persistence or API authority.

reviewers.task: Home optimistic send and streaming convergence review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the Home UI commit and independently compared its exact renderer and test bytes with the published Agent turn, draft-event, durable conversation and retry contracts on sole main 885872e9.

dimensions.summary: HomeComposer remains the single transient conversation owner while Main retains durable Agent turn, Job and conversation ownership; no duplicate submit, persistence or streaming service is added.

The published Agent turn contract remains unchanged: renderer optimism is correlated by clientTurnId and adopted durable IDs, draft events remain non-durable, and the authoritative completed answer outranks only stale UI job projection.

Existing requirement, build, exit and phase statuses remain unchanged; the candidate closes a bounded Home lifecycle defect and does not promote multi-source attachments or broader release completion.

Focused Home conversation tests cover same-frame optimism, durable deduplication, draft-to-final convergence, stale running summaries, retry restoration and vault switching; typecheck, build and UI visual gates remain directly runnable.
The product delta remains confined to App.tsx and its focused regression; this excluded recipe records the independent publication review without adding or rewriting an owner document.

nonBlockingRisks: The published single-file guards remain unchanged; ordered multi-source partial acceptance and mixed-result projection require a separate typed service vertical.
No attachment, Agent orchestration, Requirement, Build, Exit or Phase status is promoted by this repair.
Real macOS evidence covers the 420 Home send, stream and final sequence with synthetic prompts; this candidate makes no additional Windows timing claim.
